display.purpose: Hero headers and section titles, styled as high-contrast elegant italics.

body.purpose: Standard explanatory texts and list information.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Smooth entry transitions and button interactions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard action button used to launch the app.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #f5f5f5; color: #0a0a0a; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 10px; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #666666; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 10px; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); } @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) { .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #111111; color: #f5f5f5; } }

components.name: Stat Container Card
components.description: Standard elevated info box with simple dark border.
components.html:
Quests & Habits

Main Quests for core habits. Side Quests for quick wins. Each completion credits your balance instantly.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #111111; border: 1px solid #1f1f1f; border-radius: 20px; padding: 28px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #f5f5f5; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 13px; color: #666666; line-height: 1.65; }

narrative.overview: A stark, high-contrast digital ledger where green and red act as indicators of psychological and economic survival, wrapped in a premium dark slate context. There are no safe zones or soft textures. Design choices enforce discipline, urgency, and consequence.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-drenched aesthetic with deep ink-blended backgrounds
High contrast indicator elements (only pure positive green and pure negative red)
Heavy, deliberate motion mimicking natural inertia
Zero decorative cards or box borders

rules.name: The Binary Rule
rules.body: Colors outside green, red, amber, and slate-greyscale are prohibited. Green, red, and amber are signals of absolute state, never decoration.

rules.name: The Border-Only Rule
rules.body: Drop shadows are prohibited. Depth contrast is created by transitioning background values between Ledger Black (#0a0a0a) and Card Surface (#111111), with flat 1px borders (#1f1f1f) as dividers.

dos: Do format all currencies and countdown timers with tabular-nums so numbers do not shift layout while updating.
Do add @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) wrappers to all button hover states to avoid touch device sticky hovers.
Do transition all state variations using exact properties (transform, opacity) instead of using all.
donts: Don't use warm-beige background palettes (cream, sand, bone).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) or colorful box-shadows.
Don't wrap layout content in nested card elements.
Don't use bounce, elastic, or ease-in transitions for user-triggered interface loops.
